motifs.name: Exposure → Metabolite → Target Damage
motifs.description: Carcinogen undergoes metabolic activation to a reactive metabolite that damages a molecular target.

motifs.name: Exposure → Pathway Perturbation → Tissue Phenotype
motifs.description: Exposure activates or inhibits a pathway leading to tissue-level phenotypic change.

motifs.name: Modifier → Altered Detoxification → Exposure Burden
motifs.description: A host susceptibility modifier (e.g. germline variant) alters enzyme detoxification capacity, changing effective exposure burden.

motifs.name: Tissue Context → Susceptibility → Outcome
motifs.description: Tissue-specific expression context modifies susceptibility and determines downstream carcinogenic outcome.

motifs.name: Exposure Mixture → Convergent Mechanism → Shared Outcome
motifs.description: Multiple carcinogens from distinct exposure classes converge on a shared enzyme or pathway, producing a combined mechanistic burden.
